title: Arcana v0.1.0 Build Progress
subtitle: Task lifecycle across the scaffold milestone
purpose: Live view of where v0.1.0 stands. Each task moves todo → in-progress → done. Updated after every Tn closes.

tasks.title: Repo bootstrap (local)
tasks.note: Local-only; GitHub remote deferred pending KybernesisAI org access confirmation.

tasks.title: Workspace shell
tasks.note: Bun 1.3.10 + TypeScript 5.9.3 + ESLint 10.4.0 (bumped from 9) + Vitest 4.1.6 (bumped from 2). Initial guard wrapper scripts removed at T4 in favor of a real root tsconfig with project references.

tasks.title: arcana-contracts: data model schemas
tasks.note: First package landed. 9 Zod schemas + Scopes (Memory, Chunk, Entity, Edge, Fact, Contradiction, Insight, EntityProfile, AgentSelf). 22 tests passing across 7 test files. Wrapper scripts deleted; root tsconfig.json now uses real project references. Granular subpath exports declared (./scopes, ./memory, ./entity, ./edge, ./fact, ./insight, ./agent-self). Zod 3.x pinned per SPEC.
